conversation.content: Hi there! I'm here to help you with a few questions. Let's start. Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge?
I guess a bit, but not all the time.
Just to clarify, would you say it's not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Hmm, maybe several days.
Got it! Now, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by not being able to stop or control worrying?
Sometimes, but it varies.
Could you indicate if that's not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Uh, I would say more than half the days, actually.
Thanks for that! Next question: over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by worrying too much about different things?
I tend to worry, it’s just part of life, right?
Just to help me gauge this better: would you say that's not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I’d say several days.
Understood. Now, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by trouble relaxing?
It's been a bit tough sometimes.
Would that be not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Probably more than half the days.
Thank you for clarifying! Now, how often have you been bothered by being so restless that it is hard to sit still?
Oh, I have days where I just can't sit still.
Is that not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I would say nearly every day.
Great, thank you! Now, how often have you been bothered by becoming easily annoyed or irritable?
I feel it sometimes, like it’s hard to manage.
To clarify, would that be not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I'd say several days.
Thank you! Last question: how often have you been bothered by feeling afraid, as if something awful might happen?
I have those moments occasionally.
Is that not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I think that's several days too.
Thank you for your answers! You've completed the survey.

Hi there! I’m here to ask you a few questions about your feelings over the past two weeks. Let’s start with the first one: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge?
Well, there were a couple of moments, but nothing too serious.
Got it! Just to clarify, would you say that was not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Hmm, maybe several days.
Thank you! Next question: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by not being able to stop or control worrying?
I mean, it’s come up a little, but I guess I managed it.
Thanks for sharing! To better gauge it, would you say it was not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I would say it was just a couple of days.
Understood! Moving on: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by worrying too much about different things?
Oh, it happens from time to time, I guess.
Okay! Would you categorize that as not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Probably several days.
Thank you! Next: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by trouble relaxing?
I just felt a bit tense, but I thought it was normal.
I see! Would you say this happened not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Maybe several days as well.
Thanks for that! Now for the next one: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by being so restless that it is hard to sit still?
Yeah, there were a few times I felt fidgety.
Thanks! When you say 'a few times,' would you say that was not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I'd go with several days.
Got it! Next: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by becoming easily annoyed or irritable?
I guess I got annoyed a bit more than usual.
Thanks for sharing that! Would you classify that as not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Probably more than half the days.
Thanks for your honesty! Last question: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling afraid, as if something awful might happen?
I wouldn’t say it’s often, but there were times I felt uneasy.
To clarify, would you say that was not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Definitely not at all.
Thank you for answering all the questions! I appreciate your time.
Hi there! I'm here to help with a few questions about how you've been feeling lately. First, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge?
I guess... I mean, sometimes I feel a bit on edge.
Thank you for sharing that. Just to clarify, would you say that feeling on edge has been happening not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Oh, probably just several days.
Got it! Now, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by not being able to stop or control worrying?
Well, I worry sometimes, but it's not all the time.
I understand. Would you say this difficulty in controlling worry occurred not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Hmm... maybe several days again?
Thanks for clarifying! Next question: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by worrying too much about different things?
Yeah, I think that happens too sometimes.
Just to specify, would you categorize that as not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Probably more than half the days.
Thank you! Now, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by trouble relaxing?
I don’t find it easy to relax, especially in the evenings.
Would you say this trouble with relaxing has been not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Definitely more than half the days.
Got it! How about being so restless that it is hard to sit still, over the last two weeks?
Oh, I sometimes feel fidgety, but it’s not that bad.
To clarify, would you rate that feeling as not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I’d say it’s probably several days.
Thanks for sharing! Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by becoming easily annoyed or irritable?
I can get a bit annoyed, but that depends on the situation.
That makes sense. Would you say that happens not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I think that’s often, maybe several days.
Thank you for your responses. Finally, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling afraid, as if something awful might happen?
I don’t really think about it too much, but it crosses my mind sometimes.
Would you consider that feeling to occur not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Maybe several days.

Hi there! I'm here to help you with a few questions about how you've been feeling. Let's start with the first one. Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge?
Oh, I mean, I've felt that way a bit, I guess. Just sometimes.
Just to clarify, when you say 'sometimes,' would that be 'not at all,' 'several days,' 'more than half the days,' or 'nearly every day'?
I would say... maybe 'several days'?
Got it! How about the next question? Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by not being able to stop or control worrying?
Hmm, a little, I think. It's just, you know, life has its worries.
I understand. Could you specify how often that bothered you? Was it 'not at all,' 'several days,' 'more than half the days,' or 'nearly every day'?
Probably 'not at all' then.
Thanks for clarifying! Moving on to the next question: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by worrying too much about different things?
I think that might have happened a few times.
So, would you say that was 'several days'?
Yeah, I’d go with that.
Great! Now, how about trouble relaxing? Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by that?
It's been kind of hard to unwind sometimes.
Would you say that's 'not at all,' 'several days,' 'more than half the days,' or 'nearly every day'?
Maybe 'more than half the days'.
Thank you! Alright, next: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by being so restless that it's hard to sit still?
I've felt a bit restless here and there.
So would you say that feeling was 'not at all,' 'several days,' 'more than half the days,' or 'nearly every day'?
Probably just 'several days'.
Thanks! Now, Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by becoming easily annoyed or irritable?
I’ve had my moments, but it's not too bad.
So, would that be more like 'not at all,' 'several days,' 'more than half the days,' or 'nearly every day'?
I’d say 'several days'.
Got it! Finally, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling afraid, as if something awful might happen?
I guess I’ve had that feeling a couple of times.
Would you consider that 'not at all,' 'several days,' 'more than half the days,' or 'nearly every day'?
That sounds like 'several days' to me.
Thank you for sharing your answers! You're all done!

Hi there! I'm here to ask you a few questions about how you've been feeling lately. Let's start with the first one: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge?
I mean, I've had my moments but nothing too serious.
Got it! Just to clarify, would you say that feeling nervous has been happening not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Hmm, probably several days.
Thank you! Next question: Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by not being able to stop or control worrying?
Yeah, a bit. Sometimes it's hard to shake off my thoughts.
I understand. Would you say this happens not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Maybe more than half the days.
Thank you for clarifying! Now, how often have you been bothered by worrying too much about different things over the last two weeks?
It's just a lot on my mind, you know? I guess it happens often.
Just to be clear, would you say it's not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Definitely more than half the days.
Got it! Moving on to the next one: How often have you been bothered by trouble relaxing?
Honestly, I find it hard sometimes, but I wouldn’t say it's all the time.
Understood! Would you rate that as not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Probably several days.
Thank you! Now, how often have you been bothered by being so restless that it’s hard to sit still?
I guess it happens occasionally but sometimes I manage.
Thanks for sharing! Just to clarify, would you say this happens not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I would say it's several days.
Great, thank you! Next question: How often have you been bothered by becoming easily annoyed or irritable?
Oh, that can happen a fair bit.
Would you say this is not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I think it’s more than half the days.
Thank you for your honesty! Lastly, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling afraid, as if something awful might happen?
I sometimes feel that way, like a sense of dread.
To nail it down, would you say that feeling happens not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I’d say several days.
Hi there! I’d like to ask you a few questions about how you've been feeling lately. First, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge?
Oh, I don’t know... maybe a bit?
Could you clarify that? Would you say it was not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I guess a few days, not too often.
Got it, so that sounds like a '1' for several days. Now, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by not being able to stop or control worrying?
Well, I do worry sometimes, but it’s not terrible.
I see. Would you say that this happened not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Probably just a couple of days when I was really stressed.
That sounds like a '1' as well. Next question: how often have you been bothered by worrying too much about different things?
Hmm, I think I'm generally okay with that. Just the usual worries.
So it sounds like it didn't happen often, but could you specify?
Maybe once or twice, but I can handle it.
Alright, so let's say that's a '1' for several days. Now, how often have you been bothered by trouble relaxing?
Not all the time, but it definitely happens.
Could you rate that for me? Not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Oh, I don’t know... maybe just a few days.
It sounds like that's also a '1'. Next question: how often have you been so restless that it is hard to sit still?
Sometimes I feel a little restless, but it's manageable.
Would you say that’s not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
I’d say it’s been a few days, nothing major.
So, that's another '1' for several days. Moving on, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by becoming easily annoyed or irritable?
I mean, it happens, but not all the time.
Got it! Would you say that was not at all, several days, more than half the days, or nearly every day?
Just a couple of times, so maybe '1'.
Thank you! Finally, how often have you felt afraid, as if something awful might happen?
That’s kind of rare for me, maybe once or twice.
So that sounds like a '1' for several days. Thank you for answering all these questions!
Hi there! I'm here to help you with a few questions about how you've been feeling lately. To start, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge?
Well, I guess there were a couple of days I felt a bit off.
Just to clarify, would you say that feeling nervous or anxious bothered you 'not at all', 'several days', 'more than half the days', or 'nearly every day'?
Hmm, maybe several days, I think.
Got it! Now, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by not being able to stop or control worrying?
I mean, I do worry sometimes but it’s nothing too crazy.
Thanks for that. Just to better understand, would you say it's 'not at all', 'several days', 'more than half the days', or 'nearly every day'?
I suppose it's just a few days.
Thank you! Next, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by worrying too much about different things?
Yeah, I think there were moments when I just couldn't stop thinking.
Would you rate that as 'not at all', 'several days', 'more than half the days', or 'nearly every day'?
Probably more than half the days.
Thank you for sharing. Moving on, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by trouble relaxing?
Relaxing has been a bit tough, I guess.
To clarify, would you say it was 'not at all', 'several days', 'more than half the days', or 'nearly every day'?
I’d say it happened most days.
I appreciate your honesty. Now, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by being so restless that it is hard to sit still?
Sometimes I feel like I can't just sit there.
Would you categorize that as 'not at all', 'several days', 'more than half the days', or 'nearly every day'?
Maybe several days, I think.
Thanks! Next, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by becoming easily annoyed or irritable?
I do get annoyed sometimes, especially with work.
To narrow it down, would you say that happens 'not at all', 'several days', 'more than half the days', or 'nearly every day'?
I’d say several days.
Thank you! Finally, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling afraid, as if something awful might happen?
I've had a few moments where I felt that way.
Would you say that you felt this way 'not at all', 'several days', 'more than half the days', or 'nearly every day'?
That would be several days.

I’ve had thoughts like that occasionally.

Hi there! I’m here to help you with a few questions about how you've been feeling lately. Let's start with the first one. Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling nervous, anxious, or on edge?
Hmm, I guess I've felt that way a little, but it varies.
Okay, could you tell me how often you've experienced that feeling? You can rate it on a scale of 0 to 3, with 0 being not at all and 3 being nearly every day.
Oh, probably a 1.
Thanks for that. Next, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by not being able to stop or control worrying?
Yeah, it feels like sometimes I can't help but worry about things.
I understand. Can you rate that experience on the same scale? Just a number from 0 to 3?
Maybe a 2? Not all the time, but often.
Got it, thank you! Now, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by worrying too much about different things?
Uh, I don’t know, I think it’s just kind of there.
I see. Could you provide a specific frequency? On the scale of 0 to 3?
I’d say 1, I guess.
Thanks for that! Moving on, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by trouble relaxing?
Relaxing has been tough sometimes.
How often would you say that happens? Please rate it from 0 to 3.
Maybe a 2?
Thanks! Now, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by being so restless that it’s hard to sit still?
Well, I think it depends. Some days I’m fine, but other days...
That makes sense. Could you give a number from 0 to 3 for that?
I’d put that as a 1.
Alright! Next question. Over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by becoming easily annoyed or irritable?
I can be a bit short with people sometimes, I suppose.
How frequently does that happen? Please rate it from 0 to 3.
Probably a 2.
Thank you! Lastly, over the last two weeks, how often have you been bothered by feeling afraid, as if something awful might happen?
Sometimes I get these thoughts, but not all the time.
Understood. Can you provide a number for that feeling from the scale of 0 to 3?
I’d say a 1.

Hmm, probably more than half the days.

Sometimes I feel that way, but not all the time.
Can you specify? Is it 'not at all', 'several days', 'more than half the days', or 'nearly every day'?
I would say several days.
Thank you for your responses! That's all the questions I have for you.
